violations.text: An employee beverage was observed on a shelf with single service items. PIC removed beverage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025
Inspector observed containers stacked together while wet. Cleaned and sanitized utensils and equipment must be allowed to air dry before stacking. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler fan covers and power soaker vent below the 3-bay sink have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the storage shelves under the service line have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025
Debris and leaf litter observed around refuse area. Refuse area shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025
The outside oil receptacle is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

The floors in the walk-in cooler and near the fryers have an accumulation of soil residue, grease, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep line shelves, reach-ins, hot hold unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023

The floor drains in the kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023
